_comment: TEMPLATE (FRAMEWORK.md §C11.5). Project-scoped MCP servers = typed connections to external systems. Claude can use repo-root .mcp.json. Codex commonly wires MCP in .codex/config.toml or through an installed plugin; mirror the same server contract there when needed. Secrets come from environment/config, never hard-coded tokens. Prefer wrapping MCP calls inside a skill with guardrails. Replace placeholders and delete this _comment key.
